purpose: 1-block reexecute differential oracle (genesis -> block 1) for ExternalConsensusExecutor::execute_batch + Firewood-ethhash state-root parity (specs 10 §3.2/§17.1/§17.4, 02 §10.5/§11.1).
provenance: Go-EXECUTED against coreth (NOT hand-computed). A scratch core-package test (inline below) ran on go1.25.x via GenerateChainWithGenesis with consensus engine dummy.NewCoinbaseFaker and params.TestApricotPhase3Config (AP3 / London era => revm SpecId resolves to a London/Merge-equivalent state transition for a plain transfer). coreth EXECUTES block 1 (authoritative state transition); the post-state balances/nonces are read directly from coreth's executed StateDB. The scratch test was DELETED from the avalanchego tree after capture (tree left clean).
account_encoding_note: Roots are computed over the STANDARD 4-field Ethereum account RLP [nonce, balance, storageRoot, codeHash], matching the Firewood-ethhash backend in crates/ava-evm/src/state.rs (rlp_account). coreth's own libevm types.StateAccount appends a 5th 'Extra' field (empty 0x80 for an EOA), so coreth's StateDB roots differ; those 5-field roots are recorded in the fixture as coreth_*_state_root_5field for cross-reference. See M6.6 SPEC FINDING (4-field vs 5-field account RLP).
fee_model_note: coreth's dummy.NewCoinbaseFaker CREDITS the AP3 base fee to the coinbase (Avalanche does not burn the base fee). revm executed in this config BURNS the base fee (priority tip == 0 here, coinbase untouched -> empty -> EIP-158 excluded). The sender pays the same fee in both, so only the coinbase differs; the fixture's expected_post_state_root uses the BURN model that matches revm's default. The base-fee-to-coinbase override is M6.13 scope. See M6.6 SPEC FINDING (base-fee recipient).
block_reward_note: Avalanche is always post-merge (no PoW block reward). AvaChainSpec reports final_paris_total_difficulty == 0 but does not list Paris in its timestamp schedule, so reth's block-reward path (keyed on is_paris_active_at_block) would mint a spurious 5-ETH reward. ava-evm::evmconfig::AvaExecutorSpec forces Paris + all pre-merge Ethereum forks active at genesis (block 0). See M6.6 SPEC FINDING (chainspec should activate Paris + key pre-merge Eth forks by block).
scenario: genesis alloc = 1 funded EOA (0x71562b71...; 100 AVAX). block 1 = ONE legacy value transfer addr1 -> 0x2222...2222 (1 AVAX, 21000 gas, gasPrice = ap3.InitialBaseFee).
